results.title: Sneaky Open Championship spectator grabs club from star's bag
results.description: Lucas Herbert had a club grabbed from his bag by an opportunistic spectator during the third round of the Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, while the golfer was away discussing a ruling with officials.

results.title: Will Rohit Sharma Retire From ODIs Today? Here's What We Know So Far
results.description: Will he or won't he? Here's all we know about Rohit Sharma's potential retirement announcement after the 3rd ODI between India and England at Lord's.
